steps.title: Use the graph intercepts
steps.content:
The graph shows intercepts at $(90,0)$ and $(0,35)$. A fixed-budget equation can be written as
$$ax+by=630$$

steps.title: Find each coefficient
steps.content:
Use the $x$-intercept first.
$$90a=630$$
So $a=7$. Use the $y$-intercept next.
$$35b=630$$
So $b=18$.
